title: Hölle der Liebe - Erlebnisse aus einem Tanzpalast
actors: Vivian Gibson, Erich Kaiser-Titz, William Dieterle
plot: Experiences from a dance palace. Werner Ehlermann loves Erika Heinicke, the daughter of his general manager. Werner's younger brother Fritz arrange so that GM Henicke, who is responsible for finances, is immediately suspected of havi
